sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content:
Duck Mayonnaise It's a rich, yellow mayonnaise. Information Source Artisan Goods Energy / Health 75 33 Sell Prices Base Rancher (+20%) Artisan (+40%) 375g 450g 525g Artisan Goods Equipment Mayonnaise Machine Processing Time 3h Ingredients Duck Egg (1)
Duck Mayonnaise is an Artisan Good made by placing a Duck Egg into a Mayonnaise Machine , taking 3 hours.

sections.heading: Bundles
sections.content: Duck Mayonnaise is not used in any bundles .

sections.heading: Recipes
sections.content: Duck Mayonnaise is not used in any recipes.

sections.heading: Tailoring
sections.content: Duck Mayonnaise is used in the spool of the Sewing Machine with Cloth in the feed to create an Aquamarine Shirt . It is a white dye when used in the spool of the Sewing Machine with a dyeable clothing item in the feed.

sections.heading: Quests
sections.content: Duck Mayonnaise is not used in any quests .

sections.heading: Secrets
sections.content: If Duck Mayonnaise is placed in the partially-hidden purple box in the back room of the The Stardrop Saloon , the player will receive the ??Pinky Lemon?? statue.

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.0 : Introduced.
- 1.1 : Increased value from 300g to 375g.
- 1.4 : Can now be used in Tailoring . Fixed bug where an entire stack of Duck Mayonnaise would be consumed when interacting with the box in the Saloon.
- 1.6 : Duck Mayonnaise can now be consumed.
